stripe.label: Stripe focus
stripe.plan_line: Stripe for revenue — subscriptions, MRR, invoices, churn, payment failures, and disputes.
stripe.base_notes: Read subscriptions, invoices, payment intents, customers, disputes, prices, and balance via the official Stripe MCP server (list/search/retrieve). Strong for revenue and churn root-cause: MRR moves, subscription cancels, failed payments, disputes. Read-only is enforced by a Restricted API Key scoped Read-only (writes are 403'd at the Stripe API; see SETUP.md). WARNING: the server exposes write tools (create_refund, cancel_subscription, create_invoice) — never call them; the restricted key blocks them.
